raw_input:
[3.0/5] I want to like it but I cannot So I thought this will be nice for my 4c hair but no. So I used it on my wigs and I didn't really like the results. Its definitely not for my hair type. [5.0/5] Amazing! This thing has blown me away!

Mostly got it because I thought a straightening brush would be faster than my traditional flat iron. I wasn't wrong, I was able to go from my before pic to my after in less than 5 minutes which is impressive enough but that's not the best part!

It doesn't fry your ends!

I was very skeptical when the description said that the steam made it healthier for your hair and caused less damage and kept it moisturized.
After using it I'm a believer.
Usually when I straighten my hair my ends end up looking and feeling like straw. Literally. It looks horrible no matter what type of conditioning product, heat protector, or oil I use. I was blown away when I saw my poor over bleached ends were as smooth as the rest of my hair! It's like night and day.

It's super easy to use and it comes with a little bottle to fill the steam chamber with water. It took less than a minute to heat up and it didn't pull hair or burn my scalp.

It is hard to get some of the baby hairs well with it but that's really not a big deal.

It has clips to help section your hair into layers and I don't think I've ever been able to straighten my hair so thoroughly so quickly!

I was surprised because when I opened it I felt like there was no way it would work on my hair but it was so easy to use!

If your hair is damaged I would 1000% reccomend this to help keep your ends from looking fried.

It's as affordable as most traditional straighteners and works so much better!

Get it. [5.0/5] A+ Great item. Used daily not always as a steamer but works great for stick straight hair. A+ Recommended. My family member uses it, not personally. She uses it daily for mainly combing and straightening her hair. Gets hot quick, less than 30 secs. Used on long around 12-18 inch black, thick, full set of hair. Used after showering with damp hair mostly and works fine. Uses it as a brush/comb. Steam is used when her hair is dry. We had a hard time finding distilled water with all the shortages. So this review took us a month to complete. Normal everyday use is great on her thick rebellious hair. We don't use the steam as often but works great when hair is dry and needs moisture to brush. Great accessory or upgrade to your regular combing/brushing. Some parts are hard to get too, without a mirror or hard reach areas, like behind your head. Hope this helps. If you buy a gallon of distilled water its plenty for occasional use. [5.0/5] Works great on very long hair If you are looking for a hair straightener brush that really works great on long hair (past the middle of the back) this might just be for you.
I have very long hair that has terrible ends. I'm in need of a good hair cut! However, this straightener brush really made them look so much better, almost healthy! I used it with the steam feature and I don't think I've liked a straightener this much in a very long time.
I should probably mention something more about this device. This has a 30 second (to a minute) fast heating time, three different heat settings, a steam feature, an anti-scalding feature, and constant temperature protection. It also comes with a glove to protect your hand from the heat, a little water bottle thingy for the steam feature (I think), and a hair clip to use while straitening.
I really like this. Usually this type of thing takes me at minimum fifteen minutes or so. This took me about 7 to get a decent effect.
I recommend this if you are looking for a hair straightener that will give you a near salon look. [5.0/5] Wonderful I have 4c hair and it streams and straighten my hair with ease. I love the design and safety features. Great for beginners and expects. Great value [5.0/5] Really happy with this item I am a habitual flat iron user and recently purchased a wet to dry heating tool/comb, but decided to take a chance on this straightening brush steamer: I must say: I am quite impressed with this apparatus. It took me a quick second to get in a groove of running it through my hair, but after a few times, it was pretty easy. The tension/pull is really good and I liked how it left my hair. My hair feels so smooth and I am pretty satisfied with how my hair turned out (after my first try)... [5.0/5] A must have I was able to straighten my hair in 10 minutes. This is a game changer. [5.0/5] Looks nice This item looks nice, but it just never got shipped to me to review. [5.0/5] Works fantastic I love this hair straightener. It works so much faster than my traditional flat iron. It's practically straight in one swipe and that is with curly hair. It comes with a glove to protect the hand holding your hair while in use. I also like the addition of the steam function. This will be my go to hair straightener from now on. [3.0/5] Deceptive Advertising In My Opinion. I'm not up on beauty products, I'm 51yrs old. I have a hard time using a hair straightner and remembered when my daughter was a teen I bought a hair straightener brush for her, so I was on the lookout for one for myself. I saw this and the ad heading said "hair straightner brush". I thought the picture looked kind of funny, not like a "brush" but thought maybe it was a cover or something on it. When it came, it looked just like the photo and that wasn't a cover. That narrow skinny black thing running down it is what they call a brush. But that is NOT a brush!! It looks nothing like the one I had purchased for my daughter. It really does have 30 second heating and it's pretty. I do love the color lol. But it isn't what I was looking for nor what the title heading on the product page says it is. So just make sure that you're aware before buying this, that it isn't a true straightner brush!! [5.0/5] Hair Tool Done Right! This steam straightener is the absolute truth! I gave my hair a break for about a month from fully straightening it. I'm also overdue for a relaxer touch-up. So this was the perfect time to give this straightener a try. I'm the queen of flat irons, but I've never used a steam iron. There is a real difference! The steam silks each strand of hair. It's priced at $39 & that's a real bargain, for a tool that works so well. It's not quite meant for your edges. Get too close to your scalp & you'll surely feel the heat. It comes with a heat resistant glove, clips, water dropper, cleaning brush & protective sleeve! #BeautyMustHave [5.0/5] I am impressed! I was very nervous to try this steaming straightener brush. The directions are very thorough so I felt confident. There are a lot of warnings about this product so make sure you read the instructions carefully. Once I did a few hair sections it felt like I had been doing it for years and all my fears were gone. I did not burn myself and my hair came out super smooth and pretty. It’s easy to do a little curl at the end if you rotate your wrist outwards which I like. I would recommend this product! Quick shipping and great packaging [5.0/5] Hair straightener First time trying a straightener with steam. So far i like it left my hair manageable, not to flat maybe i need more heat,and it was a little puffy next day. Not perfect but worked fine for me. [5.0/5] My new favorite hair tool! This straightener is amazing, I was looking for something to make my hair look great and fast for the busy days and this work is minutes. I'm so impressed! There are 4 heat settings I use the 3rd setting and my hair is naturally wavy and it gets it pin straight . I can even use it on my short bangs! I'm never going back to a regular straightener. It comes with a heat protection glove also which is great! [5.0/5] Works great, looks great My wife has long, medium thick hair and this worked awesome for her. Left her hair super soft and straight. [5.0/5] Steam straight! This steam straightening iron really works great on hard to straighten hair or thick wavy hair. It comes with a heat glove and two clips. You will definitely need the heat glove because the steam gets hot!
This had my hair straight in no time and kept it straight. It left my hair shiney and healthier looking than what a normal heat iron would. It was super easy to use and works amazing! I love it! [5.0/5] Excelente la mejor compra que hago. Llego a tiempo Excelente servicio. Lo recomiendo,voy a mandar a buscar otro para mi nena.

response:
Here is a summary of the product reviews:

Most customers are very happy with this steam straightening brush, giving it mostly 5-star ratings. The standout feature that customers rave about is the steam function, which many say leaves hair smoother, shinier, and healthier-looking compared to traditional flat irons. Several reviewers noted it causes less damage to hair ends, which was a pleasant surprise.

Speed is another big plus mentioned across multiple reviews. Many customers were able to straighten their hair in 5 to 10 minutes, which is significantly faster than a traditional flat iron. The brush heats up quickly too, usually in under 30 seconds.

Customers appreciate the included accessories like the heat-resistant glove, hair clips, water bottle for the steam chamber, and cleaning brush. The anti-scalding feature was also noted as a nice safety addition.

On the downside, a couple of reviewers had issues worth noting. One person with 4c hair found it did not work well for their hair type when used on wigs. Another customer felt the product was misleadingly advertised as a brush, since it does not resemble a traditional hair straightening brush. A few users also mentioned it can be tricky to use on baby hairs, edges, and hard-to-reach areas like the back of the head.

Overall, the product is well-received as an affordable and effective alternative to traditional flat irons, particularly for people with damaged, thick, wavy, or long hair.
